tasks.label: django-check
tasks.command:
python - << 'PY'
import os, sys
os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','foodcompare.settings')
import django
django.setup()
from django.core.management import call_command
call_command('check')
print('DJANGO CHECK: OK')
PY

tasks.label: django-migrate
tasks.command: python manage.py makemigrations ; python manage.py migrate
